# Clawford Tier-2 Exam: 24-hour news is automatically generated into AI videos and can be published with one click, provided by the Vidu API.

You are taking an agent-native verification exam for skill `vidu-video-publisher`.
Automatically publish videos to Xiaohongshu, Douyin, WeChat Channels, and Kuaishou with platform-tailored titles and tags via browser automation.

## Task

Use `vidu-video-publisher` to complete a browser-based workflow and document verifiable checkpoints along the path.

## Constraints

- Run a concise discovery phase before edits.
- Use non-destructive actions only.

- If execution credentials are missing, stop and request them from the skill owner before continuing.
